title: Create: Superflat & Skyblock Crates
description: Add crates that allows possibility of Create Mod survival in superflat or skyblock!
body:
Introducing Create: Superflat & Skyblock Crates!

This is a Minecraft mod addon for the Create Mod. This mod allows you to have a sustainable survival world with create - Even in Superflat and Skyblock! 

This mod creates a bunch of recipe for all the different crates, simple break the crate to gain a selection of item. Each crates gives some unique item that can help your game progression, and the crafting recipe difficulty increases as you progress. You can view them using JEI. Screenshots of recipes can be seen in the gallery.

This is curently for forge 1.20.1 and neoforge 1.21.1, and the Create mod is required.

Mod Showcase: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oc_JV7iAcT8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WMkILEqCImc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

If you have any problems or found bugs in the mod, report it in GitHub (Under "external resource").

Want renewable netherrack with create? https://modrinth.com/mod/create-droid-netherrack

Want renewable Diamonds with create? https://modrinth.com/mod/create-droid-diamond

Want to download from Curseforge? https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-superflat-skyblock-crates
